title: PrResult
description: Output of bin/pr.sh. Three shapes: context-only (skill builds title/body), success (PR URL), or skipped (gh missing/auth). Consumed by skills/pr/SKILL.md.

oneOf.title: PrContext
oneOf.description: Emitted by --context-only mode: the head/base + commits the skill needs to synthesize a title and body before invoking the create path.

remote_url.description: Origin remote URL with embedded credentials redacted via nyann::redact_url.

oneOf.title: PrCreated
oneOf.description: Emitted on the create path when gh pr create succeeded. The `auto_merge` field is present only when --auto-merge was passed; its `outcome` reports whether `gh pr merge --auto` setup succeeded (the actual merge happens server-side later when required checks + reviews pass).

reason.description: Capped error text when outcome=failed (e.g. `auto-merge is not allowed on this repo`).

oneOf.title: PrSkipped
oneOf.description: Emitted when the create path soft-skips (gh missing, not authed, no origin remote, etc.).
